title: Scoring Output
description: Layer 4 scoring result for a single ticker. The document Layer 5 (debate) and Layer 6 (synthesis) operate on. Contains conviction, recommendation, position sizing, and full score breakdowns.

packet_reference.description: EvidencePacket.packet_id this score was computed from

evidence_score.description: Net directional balance of evidence. (bull_weight - bear_weight) / (bull_weight + bear_weight) * 100. NEUTRAL and BINARY items excluded from direction; tracked separately.

confidence_score.description: Quality and completeness confidence in the evidence base. Penalized by unresolved contradictions, binary catalysts, stale data.

conviction.description: high: evidence_score >= 55 AND confidence >= 70. medium: >= 35 AND >= 55. low: >= 15 AND >= 40. insufficient: below thresholds or confidence < 30.

position_sizing.description: full=100%, half=50%, quarter=25%, pilot=10% of target size. Downgraded one step for active MAJOR/FATAL invalidation or an imminent HIGH-impact BINARY catalyst.

bull_weight.description: Sum of reliability scores for BULLISH items

bear_weight.description: Sum of reliability scores for BEARISH items

contradiction_penalty.description: 12 pts per unresolved HIGH, 5 per MEDIUM, capped at 40

binary_catalyst_penalty.description: 8 pts per HIGH-impact BINARY catalyst, capped at 24

stale_data_penalty.description: 4 pts per stale field, capped at 16

status.description: clear: no conditions active. monitoring: approaching or minor trigger. major: MAJOR TIC triggered, reassess within 24h. fatal: thesis abandoned.

primary_risks.description: Top risk factor descriptions, sorted by probability then impact, for human review

screening_score.description: Layer 1 composite score passed through for traceability
